examples: That night, I watched him rappel into the area near a molten volcano on the island of Hawaii.
They learned to rappel down a cliff.
Once at the rappel station, connect directly to one of the anchors.
The race then began with a 60-foot rappel down a knob of rock sticking out into the Pacific Ocean.
The first rappel was easy, but the second involved going over a roof and traversing quite some distance to regain the anchor.
